reason: Quality check should start from the backend spec index and follow its review checklist.
Verify tests, config precedence, rebuild double-buffer semantics, and avoidance of forbidden backend patterns.
Verify all M2 auth, authorization, rate-limit, and rebuild errors preserve the structured response contract.
Verify M2 logs include safe api_key_id, kb_name, cache status, and rate-limit context without leaking secrets.
Verify anchors.json version changes preserve schema compatibility and atomic writes.
Verify cross-layer flow from settings to dependencies to handlers to storage and responses.
Verify new shared utilities and constants are reused instead of duplicated across endpoints and tests.
